name: "may you lend me a helping hand?"
description:
(the art is not my property,it belongs to just4glitch on deviantart. the link will be down here.)

https://www.deviantart.com/just4glitch/art/MAFIA-KRIP-x-ARCHER-BATTLER-The-Battle-Bricks-1252003967

Boiiii what was that? another remaster?????????? yeah. the archer bot felt like low quality and also felt rushed. so here's another remaster of one my second bots in here. tbh i feel like i fell off HARD. real hard in that matter,ever since i went inactive,and right where i was about to make another bot after the iota one,boom,face verification. and it temporarily halted the progress to get back but eventually i got past the check after fooling around with it. and here i am now.

"Those archery classes ain't shit."-archer battler
